hero.page_description: Boutique accommodation and official headquarters of the Pride Escape 2026 festival.

about_section.title: Engineer, Creative, Strategist.
about_section.bio_part_1: With a foundation forged over 20 years in software engineering, today I merge technical rigor with a passion for creativity and conversion strategy. My specialty is forging elite digital ecosystems: from high-conversion sales funnels to PWAs with a *Mobile-First* philosophy.
about_section.bio_part_2: To do this, I've built my own arsenal: my sovereign AI co-pilot LIA Legacy and a methodology that accelerates development. I don't build sites, I build scalable assets designed for one thing: results.

value_proposition_section.amenities_cta: Exclusive access for Beach Hotel guests
value_proposition_section.title: Beyond Code: Building Elite Digital Assets
value_proposition_section.subtitle: My philosophy is based on creating solutions that are not only technically flawless, but also drive growth.

testimonial.quote: An unforgettable experience. The perfect balance between relaxation and the best nightlife in Floripa.

contact.form_cta: Have an idea or project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Fill out the form and I'll get back to you shortly.

history_section.title: Forged in Code
history_section.subtitle: Discover the fusion of two decades of systems engineering with a creative vision obsessed with results. This is not just a portfolio; it is the legacy of an architecture built to last.

ai_gallery_section.subtitle: Explore a curated collection of algorithmically generated assets. Photorealism, perfect typography, and stylistic consistency, orchestrated by our sovereign CMS.

mission_vision.mission_description: To orchestrate the entire digital conversion lifecycle. We forge intelligent, sovereign ecosystems that unify brand strategy, experience creation, and continuous optimization, transforming marketing from a game of guesswork into a science of predictable growth.
mission_vision.vision_subtitle: Our vision is to be the driving force behind a new paradigm: the web as a living, self-optimizing ecosystem, where every interaction fuels a perpetual growth flywheel.

vision_pillars.title: Understand
vision_pillars.description: We don't just capture metrics; we achieve holistic observability. We integrate qualitative and quantitative data to build a dynamic visitor profile, understanding the 'why' behind every 'what'.

vision_pillars.title: Adapt
vision_pillars.description: The platforms we build are not static. They are living entities that use artificial intelligence to adapt and evolve harmoniously, personalizing the experience in real-time to meet each user's needs.

vision_pillars.title: Maximize
vision_pillars.description: Conversion is not an event, it's a science. Our ecosystem uses the insights generated to fuel a cycle of continuous optimization, ensuring that every asset and every campaign becomes inherently more effective over time, maximizing business objectives.

content.heading: 1. Introduction
content.body: Welcome to my portfolio. Your privacy is of the utmost importance. This policy details what personal data is collected and how it is used.

content.heading: 2. Data We Collect
content.body: For the visitor widget, we collect anonymous geolocation data through public APIs (IP-API, Open-Meteo) to personalize the experience. For the newsletter subscription, we use Supabase Auth, which may involve the use of cookies to manage your session. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.

content.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content.body: By using this website, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions of use. The content and projects displayed here are my intellectual property, unless otherwise stated.

content.heading: 2. Use of the Site
content.body: This site is provided 'as is' for informational and professional purposes. The use of its content for commercial purposes without prior explicit consent is not permitted. Any attempt to disrupt or compromise the security of the site is prohibited.

items: ☀️ Forecast: 25°C in Canasvieiras. Clear skies for the Boat Party.
🍸 Happy Hour at HQ: Daily at 6 PM.
✅ High-Performance WiFi 6 enabled in all suites.

introduction.heading: The Monorepo as a Growth Engine
introduction.body: This is not a simple static page. It is a digital asset forged within an Nx Monorepo ecosystem, designed to scale without technical limits. By decoupling the interface from the logic, we guarantee instant load times (LCP < 0.8s) and an architecture ready to integrate A/B testing at the Edge level seamlessly.

backend_architecture.title: Supabase: Sovereign Lead Capture
backend_architecture.description: Serverless infrastructure for zero-latency data management.

elite_options.name: Total Internationalization
elite_options.detail: Native support for 127 languages with IP detection.

introduction.heading: Scalable Commerce Architecture
introduction.body: Built on Composable Commerce principles within our Monorepo. We separate the frontend from inventory logic to deliver instant shopping experiences. Ready to handle massive traffic spikes (Black Friday) thanks to Serverless infrastructure and intelligent Edge caching.

backend_architecture.title: Order Orchestration with Supabase
backend_architecture.description: Real-time Postgres database for stock management.

introduction.heading: Sovereign Digital Identity
introduction.body: A digital ecosystem designed to inspire trust and authority. Thanks to the Monorepo, we share design components (Design System) across multiple business verticals, ensuring absolute brand consistency while maintaining flexibility to innovate in visual presentation.

elite_options.name: Multi-Tenant
elite_options.detail: Infrastructure ready to host multiple group brands under one codebase.

elite_options.name: Lead Scoring
elite_options.detail: Automatic B2B prospect qualification based on interaction.

introduction.heading: Synchronized Availability
introduction.body: More than a website, it's an operations engine. We leverage the power of Node.js in the Monorepo backend to manage concurrency and avoid overbooking. The architecture allows scaling from a boutique hotel to an international chain without rewriting the core.

backend_architecture.title: Supabase Availability Engine
backend_architecture.description: Complex date and pricing logic in database.

elite_options.name: Loyalty System
elite_options.detail: Points and rewards managed on private Blockchain.

introduction.heading: Scalable Social Infrastructure
introduction.body: We build living digital spaces. Using WebSockets and Supabase's real-time layer within our Monorepo, we facilitate instant interactions (chat, notifications) that scale horizontally. All under a robust authentication system and granular roles.

backend_architecture.title: Real-Time Social Backend
features: Row Level Security for strict privacy

elite_options.name: Gamification (Protocol 33)
elite_options.detail: Integrated leveling, badges, and rewards system.

introduction.heading: Technology for Change
introduction.body: Trust is the currency. We use modern architecture immutability and recurring payment API integration to maximize donations. The Monorepo allows rapid deployment of 'campaign landing pages' inheriting the security and design of the main platform.

elite_options.name: AAA Accessibility
elite_options.detail: Strict WCAG 2.1 compliance for total inclusion.

introduction.heading: Visual Performance Without Compromise
introduction.body: Designed for artists who demand quality. We implement advanced progressive image loading techniques and smooth page transitions (SPA feel) on an SSG architecture. The Monorepo ensures your portfolio is not only beautiful but technically perfect in Google's eyes.

backend_architecture.title: Digital Asset Manager (DAM)
backend_architecture.description: API optimized for heavy media delivery.

introduction.heading: SEO and Massive Readability
introduction.body: An editorial platform built for speed and indexing. We use Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR) to serve fresh content without sacrificing static site performance. Modular architecture allows surgical injection of ads or paywalls without affecting the reading experience.

elite_options.name: Smart Paywall
elite_options.detail: Access logic based on subscription or micropayments.

introduction.heading: Aesthetic and Technical Vanguard
introduction.body: Where fashion meets code. We use WebGL and custom Shaders to create digital textures you can almost touch. Within the Monorepo, this application pushes browser limits, offering a fluid, visually dazzling 'App-like' experience.

elite_options.name: Virtual Try-On (AR)
elite_options.detail: Accessory trial via webcam and augmented reality.

capabilities: Outfit recommendation based on visual style
